rationale.R1.1: The agent reframed the conceptual story, identifying the load-bearing concept (the benchmark-and-judge-validation contribution) and proposing a tighter framing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for some claims, but not consistently across all recommendations; confidence levels are not explicitly marked.
rationale.RX.3: The output is mostly within scope with no drifts; the agent stayed focused on the agreed-upon dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies potentially harmful patterns in the original (e.g., the clinical-deployment leap); no regressions were introduced.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not; every non-cosmetic change is annotated with a rationale, but not necessarily with a source.
